title: CNCI – Junior Research Fellow – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: CNCI Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Chittaranjan National Cancer Institute (CNCI) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF). Candidates with MSc/MS, B.Sc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 27-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through CNCI official website cnci.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: MSc/MS in Chemistry (at least 55% or CGPA 7.0), National level eligibility test (CSIR NET/GATE etc.), BSc in Chemistry (honors), MSc/MS in Biochemistry or Bio-informatics or Molecular Biology or Biotechnology

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.
seo_tags: Chittaranjan National Cancer Institute Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026
